<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Sujal Sahani — Developer & Digital Creator</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;1,9..40,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --black:#080808;
  --white:#f5f0eb;
  --accent:#e8ff47;
  --accent2:#ff4747;
  --mid:#1a1a1a;
  --muted:#555;
  --font-display:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;
  --font-body:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{
  background:var(--black);
  color:var(--white);
  font-family:var(--font-body);
  overflow-x:hidden;
  cursor:none;
}
.cursor{
  position:fixed;width:12px;height:12px;
  background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;
  pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  mix-blend-mode:difference;
}
.cursor-ring{
  position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--accent);border-radius:50%;
  pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  transition:width .3s ease,height .3s ease,opacity .3s ease;
  opacity:.5;
}
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;
  padding:24px 48px;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(8,8,8,.95),transparent);
}
.nav-logo{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:28px;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--accent)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:32px}
.nav-links a{font-size:13px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);opacity:.6;text-decoration:none;transition:opacity .2s}
.nav-links a:hover{opacity:1}
.hero{
  min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;
  padding:0 48px 64px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.hero-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 80% 20%,rgba(232,255,71,.07) 0%,transparent 60%),
             radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 50% at 10% 80%,rgba(255,71,71,.06) 0%,transparent 60%);
}
.hero-grid{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.03) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.03) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:80px 80px;
}
.hero-label{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:24px;opacity:.8;position:relative}
.hero-title{
  font-family:var(--font-display);
  font-size:clamp(72px,14vw,180px);
  line-height:.88;letter-spacing:-.01em;position:relative;
}
.hero-title .line2{
  color:transparent;-webkit-text-stroke:1.5px var(--white);display:block;
  padding-left:clamp(40px,8vw,120px);
}
.hero-title .dot{color:var(--accent)}
.hero-sub{
  margin-top:40px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:24px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative;
}
.hero-tagline{font-size:clamp(14px,2vw,18px);font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:rgba(245,240,235,.6);max-width:420px;line-height:1.6}
.hero-tagline strong{font-weight:400;color:var(--white);font-style:normal}
.hero-cta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-shrink:0}
.btn-primary{
  background:var(--accent);color:var(--black);font-family:var(--font-body);font-weight:500;
  font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 32px;border:none;cursor:none;
  clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 12px) 0,100% 12px,100% 100%,0 100%);
  transition:transform .2s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;
}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-outline{
  border:1px solid rgba(245,240,235,.3);color:var(--white);background:transparent;
  font-family:var(--font-body);font-weight:300;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;padding:14px 28px;cursor:none;
  transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;
}
.btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.scroll-hint{
  position:absolute;right:48px;top:50%;writing-mode:vertical-rl;
  font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(245,240,235,.3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
}
.scroll-line{
  width:1px;height:60px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--accent),transparent);
  animation:scrollLine 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes scrollLine{0%,100%{opacity:.3}50%{opacity:1}}
.marquee-wrap{
  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  padding:20px 0;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--mid);
}
.marquee-inner{display:inline-flex;animation:marquee 20s linear infinite}
.marquee-item{
  font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:32px;letter-spacing:.05em;
  color:rgba(245,240,235,.15);padding:0 40px;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
}
.marquee-item span{color:var(--accent)}
@keyframes marquee{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.section{padding:120px 48px}
.section-label{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:16px;opacity:.8}
.section-title{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,96px);line-height:.9;margin-bottom:64px}
.skills-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
}
.skill-card{background:var(--black);padding:40px 36px;transition:background .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.skill-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--accent);
  transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .4s cubic-bezier(.76,0,.24,1);z-index:0;
}
.skill-card:hover::before{transform:translateY(0)}
.skill-card:hover .skill-name,.skill-card:hover .skill-desc{color:var(--black)}
.skill-card:hover .skill-num{color:rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.skill-num{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:72px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.05);position:absolute;right:20px;top:16px;line-height:1;z-index:0;transition:color .3s}
.skill-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:20px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.skill-name{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:28px;letter-spacing:.02em;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--white);position:relative;z-index:1;transition:color .3s}
.skill-desc{font-size:13px;font-weight:300;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(245,240,235,.5);position:relative;z-index:1;transition:color .3s}
.about{padding:120px 48px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center}
.about-photos{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;position:relative}
.about-photo{width:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block}
.photo-main{grid-row:1/3;aspect-ratio:2/3}
.photo-secondary{aspect-ratio:1/1;object-position:center top}
.about-badge{
  position:absolute;bottom:-16px;right:-16px;width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  flex-direction:column;text-align:center;z-index:2;
}
.about-badge span:first-child{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:28px;color:var(--black)}
.about-badge span:last-child{font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--black);opacity:.7}
.about-content .section-label{margin-bottom:12px}
.about-content .section-title{margin-bottom:32px}
.about-text{font-size:16px;font-weight:300;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(245,240,235,.65);margin-bottom:28px}
.about-text em{color:var(--white);font-style:italic}
.about-stats{display:flex;gap:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:40px}
.stat-val{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:48px;color:var(--accent);line-height:1}
.stat-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px}
.contact{padding:120px 48px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:start}
.contact-statement{font-size:18px;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:rgba(245,240,235,.5);line-height:1.7;max-width:380px;margin-top:24px}
.contact-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}
.contact-card{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding:28px 32px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;transition:border-color .3s,transform .2s;text-decoration:none;color:inherit}
.contact-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateX(8px)}
.contact-icon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:20px}
.contact-label{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px}
.contact-val{font-size:16px;font-weight:400;color:var(--white)}
footer{padding:32px 48px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.footer-copy{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300}
.footer-name{font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:20px;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.05em}
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px);transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease}
.fade-up.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.s1{transition-delay:.1s}.s2{transition-delay:.2s}.s3{transition-delay:.3s}.s4{transition-delay:.4s}
@media(max-width:768px){
  nav{padding:16px 20px}
  .nav-links{gap:16px}
  .hero,.section,footer{padding-left:20px;padding-right:20px}
  .about{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:80px 20px;gap:48px}
  .contact{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:80px 20px}
  .scroll-hint{display:none}
  .about-photos{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .photo-main{grid-row:auto;aspect-ratio:3/4}
  .photo-secondary{display:none}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursor-ring"></div>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">SS</div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#skills">Skills</a>
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
    Scroll
  </div>
  <p class="hero-label fade-up">Full-stack creator &middot; Digital innovator</p>
  <h1 class="hero-title fade-up s1">
    SUJAL<span class="dot">.</span>
    <span class="line2">SAHANI</span>
  </h1>
  <div class="hero-sub fade-up s2">
    <p class="hero-tagline">
      I don't just follow trends&mdash;<strong>I create them.</strong><br>
      Developer &middot; Designer &middot; AI Innovator
    </p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a class="btn-primary" href="#contact">Let's Build</a>
      <a class="btn-outline" href="#skills">My Skills</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="marquee-wrap">
  <div class="marquee-inner">
    <span class="marquee-item">Android Dev</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">UI<span>/</span>UX Design</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Blender 3D</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">AI Visuals</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">AR Experiences</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Figma</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Adobe Suite</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Android Dev</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">UI<span>/</span>UX Design</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Blender 3D</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">AI Visuals</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">AR Experiences</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Figma</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Adobe Suite</span>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="section" id="skills">
  <p class="section-label fade-up">What I do</p>
  <h2 class="section-title fade-up s1">CAPABILITIES</h2>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-card fade-up s1">
      <span class="skill-num">01</span>
      <div class="skill-icon">📱</div>
      <h3 class="skill-name">Android Development</h3>
      <p class="skill-desc">Full-scale Android apps in Android Studio. Powerful, polished, and production-ready systems from concept to deploy.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card fade-up s2">
      <span class="skill-num">02</span>
      <div class="skill-icon">✦</div>
      <h3 class="skill-name">UI/UX Design</h3>
      <p class="skill-desc">Premium interfaces crafted in Figma and Adobe tools. Experiences that feel intuitive and look extraordinary.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card fade-up s3">
      <span class="skill-num">03</span>
      <div class="skill-icon">◈</div>
      <h3 class="skill-name">3D & Animation</h3>
      <p class="skill-desc">Advanced 3D design and cinematic animations in Blender. Visuals that transcend the screen.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card fade-up s4">
      <span class="skill-num">04</span>
      <div class="skill-icon">⬡</div>
      <h3 class="skill-name">AR Experiences</h3>
      <p class="skill-desc">Immersive augmented reality that blurs the line between digital and physical worlds.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card fade-up s2">
      <span class="skill-num">05</span>
      <div class="skill-icon">◉</div>
      <h3 class="skill-name">AI Visuals</h3>
      <p class="skill-desc">Cinematic AI-generated content that pushes creative limits and commands attention.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card fade-up s3">
      <span class="skill-num">06</span>
      <div class="skill-icon">▲</div>
      <h3 class="skill-name">Content Creation</h3>
      <p class="skill-desc">High-quality digital content that engages, converts, and leaves a lasting impression.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-photos fade-up">
    <img class="about-photo photo-main" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sujal Sahani">
    <img class="about-photo photo-secondary" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sujal Sahani on his Jawa">
    <div class="about-badge">
      <span>6+</span>
      <span>Skills</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="about-content">
    <p class="section-label fade-up">Who I am</p>
    <h2 class="section-title fade-up s1">BUILT<br>DIFFERENT</h2>
    <p class="about-text fade-up s2">
      A multi-skilled developer and digital creator with expertise across design, development, and AI-driven innovation.
      I believe in <em>versatility, execution, and domination</em> across multiple domains.
    </p>
    <p class="about-text fade-up s3">
      I continuously learn, adapt, and evolve with the latest technologies to stay ahead of the curve.
      My work reflects dedication, creativity, and a mindset that <em>refuses average.</em>
    </p>
    <div class="about-stats fade-up s4">
      <div><div class="stat-val">6+</div><div class="stat-label">Core Skills</div></div>
      <div><div class="stat-val">∞</div><div class="stat-label">Ideas Built</div></div>
      <div><div class="stat-val">01</div><div class="stat-label">Mission</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="contact" id="contact">
  <div class="contact-text">
    <p class="section-label fade-up">Get in touch</p>
    <h2 class="section-title fade-up s1">LET'S<br>BUILD</h2>
    <p class="contact-statement fade-up s2">
      "I don't wait for opportunities&mdash;I create them. And this portfolio is just the beginning."
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-cards fade-up s2">
    <div class="contact-card">
      <div class="contact-icon">👤</div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Name</div>
        <div class="contact-val">Sujal Sahani</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a class="contact-card" href="tel:+919006827494">
      <div class="contact-icon">📞</div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Call / WhatsApp</div>
        <div class="contact-val">+91 9006827494</div>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a class="contact-card" href="mailto:sahani72501@gmail.com">
      <div class="contact-icon">✉</div>
      <div>
        <div class="contact-label">Email</div>
        <div class="contact-val">sahani72501@gmail.com</div>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <span class="footer-copy">&copy; 2025 Sujal Sahani. All rights reserved.</span>
  <span class="footer-name">SS.</span>
</footer>

<script>
const cursor=document.getElementById('cursor');
const ring=document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
  mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;
  cursor.style.left=mx+'px';cursor.style.top=my+'px';
});
(function animRing(){
  rx+=(mx-rx)*.12;ry+=(my-ry)*.12;
  ring.style.left=rx+'px';ring.style.top=ry+'px';
  requestAnimationFrame(animRing);
})();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.skill-card,.contact-card').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{ring.style.width='60px';ring.style.height='60px';ring.style.opacity='.3'});
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{ring.style.width='36px';ring.style.height='36px';ring.style.opacity='.5'});
});
const observer=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add('visible')});
},{threshold:.15});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el=>observer.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
